title: OpenShift Helm Release & GitOps (Argo CD / OpenShift GitOps) Deployed-State Drift Detection

premiumApps.name: Splunk ITSI
premiumApps.note: optional — episode analytics on sustained GitOps drift by cluster and application key

dataSources: index=ocp_events with sourcetype=helm_release_secret for Helm release Secret type helm.sh/release.v1 decoded fields including info.status chart.metadata.version chart.metadata.appVersion and hook hints; sourcetype=argocd_application and sourcetype=argocd_applicationset for argoproj.io custom resources with spec.source.targetRevision status.sync.status status.health.status status.sync.revision; sourcetype=k8s_events for argocd-application-controller and OpenShift GitOps related reasons; sourcetype=ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot when exporting openshift-gitops-operator status; index=ocp_audit sourcetype=ocp_audit for Kubernetes API audit verbs on argoproj.io applications applicationsets and guarded workload kinds when actors are not GitOps service accounts; index=ocp_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:metrics for argocd_app_info argocd_app_sync_total series when federated from openshift-gitops monitoring endpoints; lookup declared_revision_allowlist for expected_chart_app_version and expected_git_revision_prefix governance joins.
description: Detects sustained drift between Git-declared Helm and Argo CD desired revisions and live cluster state on OpenShift, including failed or pending Helm releases, Applications that stay OutOfSync or unhealthy while automation should self-heal, ApplicationSet template mismatches, audit-proven manual mutations, hook jobs that stall, and allow-listed version violations, so platform governance can restore declarative truth before compliance and reliability degrade.
value: OpenShift Helm & GitOps declared-state drift: chart revision, sync, health, audit
grandmaExplanation: We compare the version of software your automation promised to the version the cluster is actually running. When those fall out of line, or someone changes things by hand, we raise a clear signal so teams put the truth back in the trusted record before small differences become big outages.
implementation: Land helm_release_secret, argocd_application, argocd_applicationset, k8s_events, ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot, and ocp_audit into ocp_events and ocp_audit with consistent cluster labels; federate argocd_app_info lines into ocp_metrics; normalize field aliases; maintain declared_revision_allowlist; save openshift_uc_3_3_5_gitops_helm_drift on fifteen minute cadence over earliest=-6h@h; route page and warn to GitOps platform on-call.
detailedImplementation:
Step 1 — Prerequisites

Head of Platform owns this control with the GitOps platform lead who stewards Red Hat OpenShift GitOps (Argo CD) namespaces such as openshift-gitops, the Helm and release engineering team that publishes chart versions and image digests, and the observability engineers who operate Splunk HTTP Event Collector tokens plus management-cluster collectors that export Kubernetes API state and audit streams. This use case isolates declarative drift between what automation and Git say should run versus what the cluster actually materializes: Helm release records under Secret type helm.sh/release.v1, Argo CD Application and ApplicationSet custom resources in group argoproj.io, optional OpenShift GitOps operator status surfaces, Kubernetes API audit verbs that prove manual oc edit, kubectl patch, helm upgrade --set, or console mutations, and optional Prometheus metrics from the argocd-application-controller and repo-server endpoints when your platform monitoring scrapes them.

Scope boundaries are explicit so sibling analytics stay distinct. UC-3.3.16 remains OpenShift DeploymentConfig and ReplicationController rollout condition storytelling on apps.openshift.io, not Git-tracked revision equivalence. UC-3.3.7 remains BuildConfig and Build object failures on build.openshift.io. UC-3.3.11 remains Operator Lifecycle Manager Subscription, InstallPlan, ClusterServiceVersion, and CatalogSource reconcile health on operators.coreos.com. UC-3.3.1 remains ClusterVersion and Cluster Version Operator upgrade progression on config.openshift.io. UC-3.2.6 remains vanilla Kubernetes Deployment and ReplicaSet rollout failures without interpreting Argo CD sync or Helm release status semantics. This UC does not replace pod crash logs, node pressure analytics, or generic admission webhook latency studies unless they manifest as sustained GitOps or Helm declared-state divergence.

Conceptual model: GitOps controllers continuously compare desired state in Git (or OCI Helm repositories) against live API objects. Argo CD exposes that story through Application status fields including sync.status, health.status, revision, reconciledAt, and operationState. Helm exposes it through release Secret blobs whose decoded info.status names such as deployed, failed, pending-upgrade, pending-rollback, superseded, uninstalled, and through chart.metadata.version and chart.metadata.appVersion compared to enterprise allow lists. Drift appears when sync.status stays OutOfSync while auto-sync is expected, when health.status leaves Healthy for longer than policy, when Helm status is not deployed while workloads still run an older generation, when ApplicationSet child Applications target a different revision than the generator template intended, when audit shows human writers mutating fields that Git should own, when compare annotations or last-applied hashes disagree with live object generations, when releases linger in pending-rollback or superseded long after change windows, or when policy automation from OpenShift GitOps lags manual remediation.

RBAC and safety: collectors that list Secrets of type helm.sh/release.v1 must use dedicated ServiceAccounts with get list watch on secrets only in Helm-managed namespaces from an allow list, or decode release payloads on management hosts after retrieval over encrypted kubeconfig, never cluster-admin credentials on laptops. Argo CD Application reads require get list watch on applications.argoproj.io in scoped namespaces such as openshift-gitops or team-owned Argo instances. Audit collection must respect data minimization; prefer Metadata level for high-volume read noise if RequestResponse is prohibited, but retain RequestResponse for patch update create on workloads implicated in drift. Legal review should confirm repository URLs, internal registry hostnames, and sealed secret fingerprints are acceptable in the analytics tier.

Index design: designate index=ocp_events for structured snapshots such as sourcetype=helm_release_secret decoding Helm release JSON into fields like release_name, release_namespace, helm_status, chart_version, chart_app_version, revision_counter, and sourcetype=argocd_application flattening metadata.name, spec.project, spec.source.repoURL, spec.source.targetRevision, spec.destination.namespace, status.sync.status, status.health.status, status.sync.revision, status.reconciledAt; sourcetype=argocd_applicationset for generator and template targetRevision governance; sourcetype=k8s_events for controller events involving Application, ApplicationSet, or Helm secrets; sourcetype=ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot for openshift-gitops-operator or cluster GitOps CR status when you export it. Designate index=ocp_audit for sourcetype=ocp_audit administrative verbs on argoproj.io applications, applicationsets, appprojects, and on apps Deployments ConfigMaps Secrets Services when correlating manual edits. Designate index=ocp_metrics for sourcetype=prometheus:metrics lines such as argocd_app_info, argocd_app_sync_total, argocd_app_health_status, argocd_kubectl_request_total when labels survive federation. Retention should cover at least fourteen days hot for incident replay on OutOfSync dwell, thirty days for quarterly configuration attestations, and cold storage aligned to observability policy.

Lookup design: maintain | inputlookup declared_revision_allowlist with columns cluster, namespace, app_key, expected_chart_app_version, expected_git_revision_prefix, helm_or_argo, owner_team, change_ticket_optional, suppress_until. Platform teams populate expected values after change approval. The saved search joins allow list expectations to live telemetry so benign pin moves downgrade severity while unexpected divergence pages.

Risk briefing: legitimate sync windows, maintenance pauses, and canary Application objects may remain OutOfSync by design; alerts must combine dwell minutes, auto-sync flags, syncOptions RespectIgnoreDifferences, and lookup suppressions. Helm superseded is normal historical state for non-latest revisions; target the latest revision Secret per release or decode release version ordering carefully. SealedSecrets and similar controllers intentionally rewrite Secrets; pair health signals with source-typed events to avoid blaming application teams for controller-managed churn. Image tags that stay constant while registries move digests create digest drift Argo CD may surface as OutOfSync on image fields even when tags look unchanged.

Collector posture: stamp change_ticket_id onto HTTP Event Collector payloads when maintenance touches GitOps objects. When Splunk shows OutOfSync but Git history is clean, suspect manual kubectl or console edits and pivot to ocp_audit user_actor. When Splunk shows chart_app_version divergence without Git changes, suspect helm upgrade --set or OCI chart mirrors serving unexpected digests. When ApplicationSet rows show template versus child drift, validate generator naming and merge keys before blaming application repositories.

Operational differentiation recap: this control is Helm and Argo CD declarative drift governance, not DeploymentConfig rollouts, not BuildConfig builds, not OLM operator installs, not ClusterVersion upgrades, not vanilla Deployment ReplicaSet conditions alone.

Step 2 — Configure data collection

Stand up five complementary lanes Splunk multisearch can fuse: Helm release Secret snapshots or watch streams, Argo CD Application and ApplicationSet API snapshots, Kubernetes Events from argocd-application-controller and related pods, OpenShift GitOps operator or subscription status snapshots when you standardize on the operator, and Kubernetes audit records for manual mutations; add a sixth optional lane for Prometheus Argo CD metrics after the primary correlation.

Helm lane: schedule a utility every five minutes that lists Secrets with type helm.sh/release.v1 in allowed namespaces or cluster-wide if policy permits. For each release, decode the release data blob per Helm storage conventions, flatten info.status, chart.metadata.version, chart.metadata.appVersion, info.last_deployed, and hook resources if present. Emit sourcetype=helm_release_secret with cluster, namespace, release_name, helm_status, chart_version, chart_app_version, revision_no, last_deployed_epoch, hook_pending_hint when hooks show incomplete jobs, and raw_sha256 of the secret body minus volatile resourceVersion when tamper evidence is required. Flag failed, pending-upgrade, pending-rollback, and uninstalled-with-workloads-still-present patterns explicitly.

Argo CD Application lane: export Application CRs from openshift-gitops or per-tenant Argo namespaces using oc get applications.argoproj.io -A -o json or an informer. Flatten spec.sources when multiple sources exist, preserve source.repoURL, source.targetRevision, source.path, source.chart, destination.namespace, destination.name. Flatten status.sync.status, status.sync.comparedTo.source targetRevision, status.health.status, status.operationState.phase, status.reconciledAt, status.summary.images when useful for digest drift heuristics. Emit sourcetype=argocd_application. Compute annotation-based hints when argocd.argoproj.io sync-options or compare annotations appear.

ApplicationSet lane: export ApplicationSet objects, flatten spec.generators merge matrix git directories, template.spec.source.targetRevision, and status conditions. Emit sourcetype=argocd_applicationset. Child Application name collisions from generator misconfiguration should surface as duplicate app_key rows in downstream stats.

Events lane: forward Kubernetes Events with sourcetype=k8s_events preserving involvedObject.kind involvedObject.name involvedObject.namespace reason message count. Retain controller-related reasons for Argo CD and Helm operators. Normalize controller pod names such as argocd-application-controller and openshift-gitops-operator-controller-manager when your exporter adds pod fields.

GitOps operator lane: if the cluster runs openshift-gitops-operator, export operator-specific CR status if your organization snapshots it; emit sourcetype=ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot with high-level phase messages useful for policy automation correlation without duplicating UC-3.3.11 CSV analytics.

Audit lane: ship Kubernetes audit JSON into index=ocp_audit with sourcetype=ocp_audit. Ensure objectRef.apiGroup captures argoproj.io when GitOps objects are edited directly. For workload drift, retain apps v1 deployments, v1 configmaps, v1 secrets when verbs are patch update create from users outside the GitOps service accounts. Extract user.username user.groups and impersonatedUser when present.

Prometheus lane: federate Argo CD metrics from openshift-gitops metrics services as your version documents. Land argocd_app_info, argocd_app_sync_total, and health gauge series into index=ocp_metrics with sourcetype=prometheus:metrics preserving dest_namespace, name, project labels.

Example oc verification operators run during design reviews:

oc get secret -n app-ns -l owner=helm,name=mychart -o json
oc get applications.argoproj.io -n openshift-gitops -o yaml
oc get applicationsets.argoproj.io -A -o yaml

props.conf guidance: TRUNCATE sufficiently large for Helm release JSON, TIMESTAMP_FIELDS respected when HEC time is authoritative, LINE_BREAKER rules for NDJSON watch streams, FIELDALIAS copying status.sync.status into sync_status when exporters differ.

Pre-save validation: index=ocp_events sourcetype=helm_release_secret earliest=-1h returns non-zero counts; argocd_application rows appear; k8s_events shows Argo CD reasons during intentional sync tests; ocp_audit captures controlled kubectl patch events; prometheus lines include argocd_app_info after scrape begins.

Dashboards: host a matrix by cluster namespace app_key with severity coloring, drilldowns to raw helm JSON, Application YAML snapshots, event text, audit user attribution, and metric labels.

Step 3 — Create the search and alert

Save the SPL as openshift_uc_3_3_5_gitops_helm_drift with a fifteen minute schedule, dispatch earliest=-6h@h, dispatch latest=now, and alert when severity is page or warn. Throttle duplicate cluster namespace app_key rows for thirty minutes unless severity escalates. Include recommended_action, helm_status, sync_status, and health_status in pager bodies.

Pipeline narrative: multisearch fans Helm release, Argo CD Application, Argo CD ApplicationSet, Kubernetes Events from controllers, and Audit mutation arms; an optional metrics arm joins after aggregation for corroboration. coalesce() absorbs field naming drift across exporters. streamstats measures dwell of OutOfSync or non-deployed states per key. eventstats adds cluster-level counts of failed Helm releases. case() maps Helm failed and long pending-rollback, Application OutOfSync with auto-sync, Degraded health sustained, ApplicationSet template versus child revision mismatch hints, audit-detected manual mutations on guarded fields, and allow list violations into page warn or info tiers. join to declared_revision_allowlist supplies governance context. recommended_action encodes concise verbs referencing oc describe application, Argo CD sync documentation, helm history, and audit queries without pretending Splunk replaces the CLI.

Fenced SPL must match the spl JSON field exactly:

```spl
`comment("UC-3.3.5 OpenShift Helm + Argo CD / OpenShift GitOps declared-vs-running drift — helm_release_secret argocd_application argocd_applicationset k8s_events ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot ocp_audit plus join prometheus. Tunables: os_window>=2 over last eight Application snapshots flags sustained OutOfSync; earliest=-6h@h latest=now")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=helm_release_secret earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, release_namespace, k8s_namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(release_name, name, helm_release, ""))))
      | eval helm_status=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(helm_status, info_status, status, ""))))
      | eval chart_app_version=trim(toString(coalesce(chart_app_version, chart_appVersion, app_version, "")))
      | eval chart_version=trim(toString(coalesce(chart_version, chart_chart_version, "")))
      | eval revision_no=trim(toString(coalesce(revision_no, version, "")))
      | eval hook_pending_hint=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(hook_pending_hint, hook_stuck, "0")),10)
      | eval lane="helm_lane"
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(helm_status) AS helm_status latest(chart_app_version) AS chart_app_version latest(chart_version) AS chart_version latest(revision_no) AS revision_no max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=argocd_application earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, metadata_namespace, app_namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(metadata_name, name, application_name, ""))))
      | eval sync_status=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(status_sync_status, sync_status, ""))))
      | eval health_status=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(status_health_status, health_status, ""))))
      | eval spec_target_rev=trim(toString(coalesce(spec_source_targetRevision, target_revision, spec_target_revision, "")))
      | eval live_rev=trim(toString(coalesce(status_sync_revision, sync_revision, reconciled_revision, "")))
      | eval auto_sync=if(len(trim(toString(coalesce(spec_syncPolicy_automated, syncPolicy_automated, ""))))>0,1,0)
      | eval lane="argo_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=trim(toString(coalesce(spec_source_chart_version, "")))
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=live_rev
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=live_rev
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=spec_target_rev
      | sort 0 + cluster + namespace + app_key - _time
      | streamstats window=8 current=t global=f sum(eval(if(lower(sync_status)="outofsync",1,0))) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(sync_status) AS sync_status latest(health_status) AS health_status latest(spec_target_rev) AS spec_target_rev latest(live_rev) AS live_rev max(auto_sync) AS auto_sync latest(chart_app_version) AS chart_app_version latest(helm_status) AS helm_status latest(revision_no) AS revision_no max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(audit_mut_hint) AS audit_mut_hint latest(appset_child_rev) AS appset_child_rev latest(appset_tmpl_rev) AS appset_tmpl_rev max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=argocd_applicationset earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, metadata_namespace, ""))))
      | eval appset_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(metadata_name, name, ""))))
      | eval tmpl_rev=trim(toString(coalesce(template_spec_source_targetRevision, template_target_revision, "")))
      | eval lane="appset_lane"
      | eval app_key=appset_name
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=tmpl_rev
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(tmpl_rev) AS tmpl_rev max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events (sourcetype=k8s_events OR sourcetype=ocp_events) earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval kn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_kind, involved_kind, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_namespace, involved_namespace, namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_name, involved_name, object_name, ""))))
      | eval reason_ev=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(reason, Reason, ""))))
      | eval msg_ev=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(message, Message, ""))))
      | eval pod_src=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(source_component, reportingController, ""))))
      | where kn="application" OR kn="applicationset" OR match(pod_src,"argocd-application-controller|openshift-gitops|gitops") OR match(msg_ev,"argocd|gitops|helm|sync|outofsync|degraded")
      | eval lane="evt_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=if(match(reason_ev,"failedcreate|failed|backoff|hook"),1,0)
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(reason_ev) AS evt_reason latest(msg_ev) AS evt_msg max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, "openshift-gitops-operator"))))
      | eval app_key="platform_gitops_operator_status"
      | eval gitops_op_phase=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(phase, status_phase, operator_phase, reconcile_phase, ""))))
      | eval gitops_op_bad=if(match(gitops_op_phase,"degraded|failed|error|unknown"),1,0)
      | eval lane="gitops_op_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval auto_sync=0
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(gitops_op_phase) AS gitops_op_phase max(gitops_op_bad) AS gitops_op_bad max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_audit sourcetype=ocp_audit earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval apigroup=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_apiGroup, apiGroup, ""))))
      | eval resource=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_resource, resource, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_namespace, namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_name, object_name, ""))))
      | eval verb=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(verb, request_verb, ""))))
      | eval user_actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user_username, user, ""))))
      | eval gitops_sa=if(match(user_actor,"argocd|openshift-gitops|system:serviceaccount:openshift-gitops"),1,0)
      | where gitops_sa==0 AND match(verb,"create|update|patch") AND (match(apigroup,"argoproj.io") OR match(resource,"deployments|configmaps|secrets|services|statefulsets|daemonsets"))
      | eval lane="audit_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status="manual_mutation"
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=1
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen max(audit_mut_hint) AS audit_mut_hint latest(user_actor) AS audit_actor latest(verb) AS audit_verb max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
| eval namespace=lower(trim(coalesce(namespace, "unknown_namespace")))
| eval app_key=lower(trim(coalesce(app_key, "unknown_app")))
| stats max(last_seen) AS last_seen max(helm_status) AS helm_status max(sync_status) AS sync_status max(health_status) AS health_status max(chart_app_version) AS chart_app_version max(chart_version) AS chart_version max(revision_no) AS revision_no max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(audit_mut_hint) AS audit_mut_hint max(auto_sync) AS auto_sync first(spec_target_rev) AS spec_target_rev first(live_rev) AS live_rev first(tmpl_rev) AS tmpl_rev first(evt_reason) AS evt_reason first(evt_msg) AS evt_msg max(os_window) AS os_window max(gitops_op_bad) AS gitops_op_bad first(gitops_op_phase) AS gitops_op_phase BY cluster namespace app_key
| fillnull value=0 gitops_op_bad
| fillnull value="" gitops_op_phase
| eval primary_lane=case(audit_mut_hint>0, "audit_lane", len(helm_status)>0, "helm_lane", len(tmpl_rev)>0, "appset_lane", len(sync_status)>0, "argo_lane", gitops_op_bad>0, "gitops_op_lane", true(), "event_or_mixed")
| join type=left max=0 cluster namespace app_key
    [| inputlookup declared_revision_allowlist
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(cluster)))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(namespace)))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(app_key)))
      | eval expected_chart_app_version=trim(toString(expected_chart_app_version))
      | eval expected_git_revision_prefix=trim(toString(expected_git_revision_prefix))
      | fields cluster namespace app_key expected_chart_app_version expected_git_revision_prefix helm_or_argo owner_team suppress_until ]
| eval git_pat="^" . expected_git_revision_prefix
| eval allowlist_match=if(isnotnull(expected_git_revision_prefix) AND len(expected_git_revision_prefix)>0 AND match(live_rev, git_pat),1,0)
| eval allowlist_match=if(isnotnull(expected_chart_app_version) AND len(expected_chart_app_version)>0 AND chart_app_version=expected_chart_app_version,1,allowlist_match)
| eval rev_drift=if(len(spec_target_rev)>0 AND len(live_rev)>0 AND spec_target_rev!=live_rev AND match(sync_status,"outofsync|unknown"),1,0)
| eval helm_bad=if(match(helm_status,"failed|pending-rollback|pending-upgrade|uninstalling"),1,0)
| eval sync_bad=if(match(sync_status,"outofsync|unknown|manual_mutation"),1,0)
| eval health_bad=if(match(health_status,"degraded|missing|progressing|suspended"),1,0)
| eventstats sum(helm_bad) AS cluster_helm_bad sum(sync_bad) AS cluster_sync_bad BY cluster
| eval severity=case(
    helm_bad==1 AND match(helm_status,"failed"), "page",
    health_bad==1 AND match(health_status,"degraded|missing"), "page",
    sync_bad==1 AND auto_sync==1 AND coalesce(os_window,0)>=2, "page",
    audit_mut_hint==1 AND match(sync_status,"outofsync|manual_mutation"), "page",
    rev_drift==1 AND allowlist_match==0 AND auto_sync==1, "page",
    hook_pending_hint==1, "warn",
    helm_bad==1 AND match(helm_status,"pending-rollback|pending-upgrade"), "warn",
    sync_bad==1 AND auto_sync==0, "warn",
    health_bad==1 AND match(health_status,"progressing"), "warn",
    allowlist_match==0 AND len(chart_app_version)>0 AND len(expected_chart_app_version)>0, "warn",
    gitops_op_bad==1, "warn",
    true(), "info")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    match(helm_status,"failed"), "helm_history_and_describe_failed_release_review_webhook_or_schema_deny",
    hook_pending_hint==1, "kubectl_get_jobs_for_helm_hooks_and_clear_stuck_hook_finalizers",
    audit_mut_hint==1, "correlate_audit_actor_revert_manual_change_or_sync_force",
    match(sync_status,"outofsync") AND auto_sync==1, "argocd_app_diff_sync_options_and_compare_overlay",
    match(health_status,"degraded"), "kubectl_describe_workloads_and_crds_for_health_message",
    allowlist_match==0, "refresh_allowlist_or_roll_forward_git_revision",
    true(), "review_gitops_and_helm_declared_versions")
| join type=left max=0 cluster namespace app_key
    [ search index=ocp_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:metrics earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, k8s_cluster_name, ""))))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__, metric_name, name, ""))))
      | eval mv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value, metric_value, Value, "0")),10)
      | where match(mn,"^argocd_app_info$|^argocd_app_sync_total$")
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(dest_namespace, exported_namespace, namespace, "metrics"))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(name, app, exported_name, "aggregate"))))
      | stats latest(_time) AS prom_seen latest(mv) AS prom_val latest(mn) AS prom_mn BY cluster namespace app_key ]
| table cluster namespace app_key primary_lane helm_status chart_version chart_app_version spec_target_rev live_rev sync_status health_status auto_sync os_window gitops_op_phase gitops_op_bad audit_mut_hint allowlist_match severity recommended_action last_seen evt_reason prom_mn prom_val

```

savedsearches.conf sketch:

```ini
[openshift_uc_3_3_5_gitops_helm_drift_alert]
cron_schedule = */15 * * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -6h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
enableSched = 1
action.email = 1
action.email.to = gitops-platform@example.com
action.email.subject = GitOps Helm drift $result.severity$ $result.cluster$ $result.namespace$/$result.app_key$
counttype = number of events
relation = greater than
quantity = 0
search = | savedsearch openshift_uc_3_3_5_gitops_helm_drift | where severity IN ("page","warn")
```

Performance: materialize helm_release_secret and argocd_application hourly summaries keyed on cluster namespace app_key when Job Inspector queue time exceeds your internal SLA; widen alert searches to earliest=-2h@h on summaries while retaining this search for investigations.

For Splunk ITSI optional deployments, bind KPIs to rates of page severity by cluster and episode policies when two consecutive windows remain non-info for tier-one application keys.

Step 4 — Validate

Ground truth always starts on-cluster. Run oc get applications.argoproj.io -n openshift-gitops and helm list in application namespaces, then compare sync and health fields and Helm status to Splunk rows inside the last snapshot window. When fields disagree, verify resourceVersion freshness, indexer clock skew, and duplicate cluster labels before blaming parsers.

Helm cross-check: oc get secret -l owner=helm -n target-namespace and decode release payloads to compare chart.metadata.appVersion to Splunk chart_app_version.

Argo CD cross-check: use the Argo CD web user interface or supported CLI if permitted to inspect application diff and compare last-applied annotations against live Deployments when investigating hash drift hypotheses.

Audit cross-check: replay a controlled kubectl patch on a Deployment outside the GitOps service account and confirm ocp_audit rows appear with audit_actor matching the test user.

Synthetic validation: in a lab namespace, introduce an intentional OutOfSync by scaling a Deployment manually while auto-sync self-heal is disabled, ingest telemetry, and confirm severity respects auto_sync and dwell thresholds. Restore Git-declared replicas, resync, and confirm recovery.

Negative test: when Applications report Synced and Healthy, Helm latest revisions report deployed, and audit shows no non-GitOps writers during the window, confirm the alert wrapper filtered to page and warn returns zero qualifying rows.

Step 5 — Operationalize & Troubleshoot

Case 1 — Application stuck OutOfSync after cluster admin manual scale on Deployment: open the diff view, confirm live spec.replicas drift, either revert the manual scale or commit the new replica count to Git, then sync with appropriate privilege boundaries.

Case 2 — Helm release status failed after admission webhook denial during upgrade: read helm history and Kubernetes events for denied resources, fix policy or chart compatibility, then roll forward with a corrected values file.

Case 3 — ApplicationSet generators yield duplicate Application names: correct generator matrix or cluster list keys, delete stale Applications, and watch controller logs for naming collisions.

Case 4 — targetRevision pinned to a Git tag that was force-pushed: compare live git resolved revision against recorded status.revision, re-point tag or pin to immutable commit SHA, refresh repo-server caches.

Case 5 — Helm upgrade chains using reuse-values mask chart default drift: export helm get values against declared Git values, reconcile diffs, and avoid blind reuse across major chart bumps.

Case 6 — Argo CD sync window blocks auto-sync overnight: confirm application sync windows in AppProject, align paging with maintenance calendars, or adjust automation only after policy review.

Case 7 — SealedSecret rotated outside GitOps: confirm controller rewrote Secrets while Application health flips Degraded; commit refreshed sealed manifests or fix decrypt permissions rather than muting health.

Case 8 — Helm release hook Job stuck pending: inspect hook job pod scheduling, image pull, and RBAC; clear failed hooks per runbook before retrying upgrade.

Case 9 — Cluster-scoped CRD prune policy causes OutOfSync on first Application boot: add RespectIgnoreDifferences or stage CRD installs, document expected transient OutOfSync until bootstrap completes.

Case 10 — Static image tag with moving registry digest: prefer digest-pinned manifests in Git or enable image updater patterns so health and sync reflect supply-chain reality.

Case 11 — Release stuck pending-rollback or superseded for hours: validate helm rollback completion, clear failed operations, and ensure no concurrent controllers fight the same release Secret.

Case 12 — OpenShift GitOps policy automation lag after manual remediation: compare Policy custom resource or operator status timestamps with Splunk audit_actor timelines to ensure declarative governance catches up or opens a tracked exception.

Closing checklist: multisearch lists Helm Application ApplicationSet event and audit arms with optional metrics join; coalesce inside each arm absorbs exporter drift; streamstats inside the Application snapshot arm counts OutOfSync observations in a sliding window; eventstats adds cluster context; case maps severity; inputlookup declared_revision_allowlist governs expectations; closing table carries cluster namespace app_key primary_lane helm_status chart_version chart_app_version spec_target_rev live_rev sync_status health_status auto_sync os_window audit_mut_hint allowlist_match severity recommended_action last_seen evt_reason prom_mn prom_val for nineteen analyst-visible columns.

Extended governance narrative for auditors: tie weekly exports of this saved search to change advisory records showing who approved Helm chart bumps and Git merges, correlate suppress_until fields on the allow list to freeze windows, and retain evidence that configuration compliance reviews occurred even when no page-level rows fired. Pair with inventory exports that record openshift-gitops operator version and Argo CD server version so investigators know which CRD fields were available on the incident date. Document escalation paths to application teams versus platform teams based on owner_team in the lookup. When fleets run multiple Argo instances, duplicate the saved search per instance index routing to avoid cross-tenant leakage.

Compliance coupling without claiming unrelated regulations: configuration drift in GitOps and Helm directly undermines segregation-of-duties storylines where only automation should mutate production namespaces. Pair this analytic with change tickets so every OutOfSync row either references an approved exception or becomes a corrective action within your internal policy clock. Export CSV snapshots into restricted indexes when auditors ask for point-in-time proof that declared chart app versions matched running workloads during financial or safety-critical windows.

Hash and annotation literacy: live objects carry managedFields, resourceVersion, and sometimes argocd.argoproj.io tracking annotations. Teach collectors to preserve those annotations when flattening JSON so investigators can compare last-applied configuration hashes against Git-rendered manifests without re-running cluster queries during incidents. When annotations are stripped at ingest, Splunk can still correlate drift using revision identifiers, but hash-level investigations return to the API server.

Helm on OpenShift nuances: cluster administrators sometimes install the Helm client against the same API server that hosts OpenShift GitOps. Distinguish release Secrets created by in-cluster Helm controllers from those created by CI jobs using personal kubeconfigs. Stamp helm_origin or ci_pipeline_id on events when possible so Splunk does not blame the platform for a developer laptop experiment.

ApplicationSet and multitenancy: enterprise patterns isolate ApplicationSet controllers per management cluster or per business unit. Normalize appset_instance labels on every event so joins never cross tenant boundaries. When a generator references a private Git repository, redact credentials from error messages at the collector while retaining repository hostnames for routing.

Disaster recovery and restore drills: after etcd restore or partial cluster recovery, Helm release Secrets may reappear with older generations while Git already advanced. Expect transient severity spikes; document drill-specific suppressions keyed on cluster and drill_id rather than muting the analytic globally.

OpenShift API priority and fairness: during control-plane pressure, informer lag stretches snapshot intervals. Increase snapshot frequency modestly on critical namespaces rather than disabling the control entirely, and monitor collection delay as a first-class field so Splunk rows carry ingest_latency_sec for triage.

Integrations with image integrity: when clusters enforce admission policies that compare image digests to allow lists, Helm or Argo CD may show Healthy workloads while policy events disagree. Route admission denial events into a sibling search; this UC mentions webhook denials only where they surface as Helm failed or Argo Degraded with correlated timestamps.

FinOps adjacent signals: oversized Helm values ConfigMaps or duplicated chart versions across namespaces sometimes indicate shadow releases that bypass FinOps tagging rules. Surface chart_version and app_key cardinality in a separate dashboard; keep this UC focused on drift while feeding that dashboard from the same normalized sourcetypes.

Training and handover: platform rotations should rehearse reading Application compare views, decoding Helm release history, and tracing audit_actor fields. Capture runbook links in the Splunk alert action payload so new responders do not search documentation portals during incidents.

Version skew between exporters: OpenShift minor upgrades can rename status fields on Application objects. Maintain props.conf FIELDALIAS ladders tested during upgrade labs so coalesce paths stay valid across two minor versions during fleet rollouts.
spl:
`comment("UC-3.3.5 OpenShift Helm + Argo CD / OpenShift GitOps declared-vs-running drift — helm_release_secret argocd_application argocd_applicationset k8s_events ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot ocp_audit plus join prometheus. Tunables: os_window>=2 over last eight Application snapshots flags sustained OutOfSync; earliest=-6h@h latest=now")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=helm_release_secret earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, release_namespace, k8s_namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(release_name, name, helm_release, ""))))
      | eval helm_status=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(helm_status, info_status, status, ""))))
      | eval chart_app_version=trim(toString(coalesce(chart_app_version, chart_appVersion, app_version, "")))
      | eval chart_version=trim(toString(coalesce(chart_version, chart_chart_version, "")))
      | eval revision_no=trim(toString(coalesce(revision_no, version, "")))
      | eval hook_pending_hint=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(hook_pending_hint, hook_stuck, "0")),10)
      | eval lane="helm_lane"
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(helm_status) AS helm_status latest(chart_app_version) AS chart_app_version latest(chart_version) AS chart_version latest(revision_no) AS revision_no max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=argocd_application earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, metadata_namespace, app_namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(metadata_name, name, application_name, ""))))
      | eval sync_status=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(status_sync_status, sync_status, ""))))
      | eval health_status=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(status_health_status, health_status, ""))))
      | eval spec_target_rev=trim(toString(coalesce(spec_source_targetRevision, target_revision, spec_target_revision, "")))
      | eval live_rev=trim(toString(coalesce(status_sync_revision, sync_revision, reconciled_revision, "")))
      | eval auto_sync=if(len(trim(toString(coalesce(spec_syncPolicy_automated, syncPolicy_automated, ""))))>0,1,0)
      | eval lane="argo_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=trim(toString(coalesce(spec_source_chart_version, "")))
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=live_rev
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=live_rev
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=spec_target_rev
      | sort 0 + cluster + namespace + app_key - _time
      | streamstats window=8 current=t global=f sum(eval(if(lower(sync_status)="outofsync",1,0))) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(sync_status) AS sync_status latest(health_status) AS health_status latest(spec_target_rev) AS spec_target_rev latest(live_rev) AS live_rev max(auto_sync) AS auto_sync latest(chart_app_version) AS chart_app_version latest(helm_status) AS helm_status latest(revision_no) AS revision_no max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(audit_mut_hint) AS audit_mut_hint latest(appset_child_rev) AS appset_child_rev latest(appset_tmpl_rev) AS appset_tmpl_rev max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=argocd_applicationset earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, metadata_namespace, ""))))
      | eval appset_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(metadata_name, name, ""))))
      | eval tmpl_rev=trim(toString(coalesce(template_spec_source_targetRevision, template_target_revision, "")))
      | eval lane="appset_lane"
      | eval app_key=appset_name
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=tmpl_rev
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(tmpl_rev) AS tmpl_rev max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events (sourcetype=k8s_events OR sourcetype=ocp_events) earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval kn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_kind, involved_kind, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_namespace, involved_namespace, namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_name, involved_name, object_name, ""))))
      | eval reason_ev=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(reason, Reason, ""))))
      | eval msg_ev=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(message, Message, ""))))
      | eval pod_src=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(source_component, reportingController, ""))))
      | where kn="application" OR kn="applicationset" OR match(pod_src,"argocd-application-controller|openshift-gitops|gitops") OR match(msg_ev,"argocd|gitops|helm|sync|outofsync|degraded")
      | eval lane="evt_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=if(match(reason_ev,"failedcreate|failed|backoff|hook"),1,0)
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(reason_ev) AS evt_reason latest(msg_ev) AS evt_msg max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_events sourcetype=ocp_gitops_operator_snapshot earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(namespace, "openshift-gitops-operator"))))
      | eval app_key="platform_gitops_operator_status"
      | eval gitops_op_phase=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(phase, status_phase, operator_phase, reconcile_phase, ""))))
      | eval gitops_op_bad=if(match(gitops_op_phase,"degraded|failed|error|unknown"),1,0)
      | eval lane="gitops_op_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status=""
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=0
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval auto_sync=0
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen latest(gitops_op_phase) AS gitops_op_phase max(gitops_op_bad) AS gitops_op_bad max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
    [ search index=ocp_audit sourcetype=ocp_audit earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_id, ""))))
      | eval apigroup=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_apiGroup, apiGroup, ""))))
      | eval resource=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_resource, resource, ""))))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_namespace, namespace, ""))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(objectRef_name, object_name, ""))))
      | eval verb=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(verb, request_verb, ""))))
      | eval user_actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user_username, user, ""))))
      | eval gitops_sa=if(match(user_actor,"argocd|openshift-gitops|system:serviceaccount:openshift-gitops"),1,0)
      | where gitops_sa==0 AND match(verb,"create|update|patch") AND (match(apigroup,"argoproj.io") OR match(resource,"deployments|configmaps|secrets|services|statefulsets|daemonsets"))
      | eval lane="audit_lane"
      | eval helm_status=""
      | eval sync_status="manual_mutation"
      | eval health_status=""
      | eval chart_app_version=""
      | eval chart_version=""
      | eval revision_no=""
      | eval hook_pending_hint=0
      | eval audit_mut_hint=1
      | eval appset_child_rev=""
      | eval appset_tmpl_rev=""
      | eval os_window=0
      | stats latest(_time) AS last_seen max(audit_mut_hint) AS audit_mut_hint latest(user_actor) AS audit_actor latest(verb) AS audit_verb max(os_window) AS os_window BY cluster namespace app_key lane ]
| eval namespace=lower(trim(coalesce(namespace, "unknown_namespace")))
| eval app_key=lower(trim(coalesce(app_key, "unknown_app")))
| stats max(last_seen) AS last_seen max(helm_status) AS helm_status max(sync_status) AS sync_status max(health_status) AS health_status max(chart_app_version) AS chart_app_version max(chart_version) AS chart_version max(revision_no) AS revision_no max(hook_pending_hint) AS hook_pending_hint max(audit_mut_hint) AS audit_mut_hint max(auto_sync) AS auto_sync first(spec_target_rev) AS spec_target_rev first(live_rev) AS live_rev first(tmpl_rev) AS tmpl_rev first(evt_reason) AS evt_reason first(evt_msg) AS evt_msg max(os_window) AS os_window max(gitops_op_bad) AS gitops_op_bad first(gitops_op_phase) AS gitops_op_phase BY cluster namespace app_key
| fillnull value=0 gitops_op_bad
| fillnull value="" gitops_op_phase
| eval primary_lane=case(audit_mut_hint>0, "audit_lane", len(helm_status)>0, "helm_lane", len(tmpl_rev)>0, "appset_lane", len(sync_status)>0, "argo_lane", gitops_op_bad>0, "gitops_op_lane", true(), "event_or_mixed")
| join type=left max=0 cluster namespace app_key
    [| inputlookup declared_revision_allowlist
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(cluster)))
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(namespace)))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(app_key)))
      | eval expected_chart_app_version=trim(toString(expected_chart_app_version))
      | eval expected_git_revision_prefix=trim(toString(expected_git_revision_prefix))
      | fields cluster namespace app_key expected_chart_app_version expected_git_revision_prefix helm_or_argo owner_team suppress_until ]
| eval git_pat="^" . expected_git_revision_prefix
| eval allowlist_match=if(isnotnull(expected_git_revision_prefix) AND len(expected_git_revision_prefix)>0 AND match(live_rev, git_pat),1,0)
| eval allowlist_match=if(isnotnull(expected_chart_app_version) AND len(expected_chart_app_version)>0 AND chart_app_version=expected_chart_app_version,1,allowlist_match)
| eval rev_drift=if(len(spec_target_rev)>0 AND len(live_rev)>0 AND spec_target_rev!=live_rev AND match(sync_status,"outofsync|unknown"),1,0)
| eval helm_bad=if(match(helm_status,"failed|pending-rollback|pending-upgrade|uninstalling"),1,0)
| eval sync_bad=if(match(sync_status,"outofsync|unknown|manual_mutation"),1,0)
| eval health_bad=if(match(health_status,"degraded|missing|progressing|suspended"),1,0)
| eventstats sum(helm_bad) AS cluster_helm_bad sum(sync_bad) AS cluster_sync_bad BY cluster
| eval severity=case(
    helm_bad==1 AND match(helm_status,"failed"), "page",
    health_bad==1 AND match(health_status,"degraded|missing"), "page",
    sync_bad==1 AND auto_sync==1 AND coalesce(os_window,0)>=2, "page",
    audit_mut_hint==1 AND match(sync_status,"outofsync|manual_mutation"), "page",
    rev_drift==1 AND allowlist_match==0 AND auto_sync==1, "page",
    hook_pending_hint==1, "warn",
    helm_bad==1 AND match(helm_status,"pending-rollback|pending-upgrade"), "warn",
    sync_bad==1 AND auto_sync==0, "warn",
    health_bad==1 AND match(health_status,"progressing"), "warn",
    allowlist_match==0 AND len(chart_app_version)>0 AND len(expected_chart_app_version)>0, "warn",
    gitops_op_bad==1, "warn",
    true(), "info")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    match(helm_status,"failed"), "helm_history_and_describe_failed_release_review_webhook_or_schema_deny",
    hook_pending_hint==1, "kubectl_get_jobs_for_helm_hooks_and_clear_stuck_hook_finalizers",
    audit_mut_hint==1, "correlate_audit_actor_revert_manual_change_or_sync_force",
    match(sync_status,"outofsync") AND auto_sync==1, "argocd_app_diff_sync_options_and_compare_overlay",
    match(health_status,"degraded"), "kubectl_describe_workloads_and_crds_for_health_message",
    allowlist_match==0, "refresh_allowlist_or_roll_forward_git_revision",
    true(), "review_gitops_and_helm_declared_versions")
| join type=left max=0 cluster namespace app_key
    [ search index=ocp_metrics sourcetype=prometheus:metrics earliest=-6h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster, openshift_cluster, cluster_name, k8s_cluster_name, ""))))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__, metric_name, name, ""))))
      | eval mv=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value, metric_value, Value, "0")),10)
      | where match(mn,"^argocd_app_info$|^argocd_app_sync_total$")
      | eval namespace=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(dest_namespace, exported_namespace, namespace, "metrics"))))
      | eval app_key=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(name, app, exported_name, "aggregate"))))
      | stats latest(_time) AS prom_seen latest(mv) AS prom_val latest(mn) AS prom_mn BY cluster namespace app_key ]
| table cluster namespace app_key primary_lane helm_status chart_version chart_app_version spec_target_rev live_rev sync_status health_status auto_sync os_window gitops_op_phase gitops_op_bad audit_mut_hint allowlist_match severity recommended_action last_seen evt_reason prom_mn prom_val
cimSpl:
| tstats summariesonly=true latest(Change.action) AS change_action latest(Change.object) AS change_object latest(Change.user) AS change_user FROM datamodel=Change WHERE nodename=Change earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Change.dest
| rename Change.dest AS cim_dest
| join type=left max=0 cim_dest
    [| tstats summariesonly=true latest(Inventory.vendor_product) AS vendor_product latest(Inventory.version) AS inv_version FROM datamodel=Inventory WHERE nodename=Inventory earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Inventory.dest
     | rename Inventory.dest AS cim_dest ]
| where like(lower(change_object), "%application%") OR like(lower(change_object), "%helm%") OR like(lower(change_object), "%gitops%") OR like(lower(vendor_product), "%openshift%")
| table cim_dest change_action change_object change_user vendor_product inv_version
dataModelAcceleration: Accelerate Splunk CIM Change summaries for GitOps and Helm mutation trails mapped into Change.object and Change.user, and Inventory summaries for cluster assets carrying OpenShift GitOps operator versions; retain thirty days for configuration attestation reviews.
visualization: Severity-colored table by cluster namespace app_key with drilldowns to helm release JSON, Application snapshots, events, audit rows, and prometheus labels; timeline of sync_status and health_status; single-value tiles for cluster_helm_bad rates.
knownFalsePositives: Planned maintenance with sync disabled legitimately shows OutOfSync until operators click sync; suppress with change_ticket_id on HEC metadata or lookup suppress_until. Canary Applications that intentionally lag production Git branches resemble drift; annotate app_key rows or split indexes. Helm superseded rows for old revision Secrets are normal; always evaluate the latest revision per release or decode version ordering before paging. SealedSecrets, reencrypt controllers, and cert-manager rewrite Secrets without malice; pair Degraded health with message text. Image updater sidecars and OCI Helm mirrors can cause short-lived revision churn during cache refresh. Audit Metadata-only streams omit requestObject bodies; patch detection may miss fields unless you enable RequestResponse for governed resource types. Prometheus label churn hides argocd_app_info joins; repair federation before muting. ApplicationSet template targetRevision comparisons to child Applications require consistent exporter flattening; false mismatches occur when child overrides are intentional.
hardware: Applies to Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform estates running user-workload or platform-managed namespaces where Helm releases and Red Hat OpenShift GitOps (Argo CD) controllers reconcile applications; x86_64 and AArch64 clusters are in scope when telemetry labels remain consistent.
exclusions: Does not cover UC-3.3.16 DeploymentConfig rollout failures, UC-3.3.7 BuildConfig build pipeline failures, UC-3.3.11 OLM Subscription and CSV health, UC-3.3.1 ClusterVersion upgrades, or UC-3.2.6 vanilla Kubernetes Deployment rollout failures as primary signals. Does not approve Git merges or run helm upgrade; it produces evidence for human-approved GitOps and Helm remediation.

controlTest.positiveScenario: In a lab OpenShift project, disable self-heal on a test Application, kubectl scale a Deployment without committing Git, ingest argocd_application helm_release_secret k8s_events and ocp_audit rows, run openshift_uc_3_3_5_gitops_helm_drift, and expect page or warn with non-null recommended_action within fifteen minutes after dwell thresholds elapse.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Re-enable self-heal or revert manual scale, sync Application to Synced Healthy, confirm Helm release reports deployed, and verify the alert wrapper filtered to page and warn emits zero qualifying rows for that app_key across thirty minutes.

evidence: Saved search openshift_uc_3_3_5_gitops_helm_drift with fifteen minute schedule; dashboard drilldowns on helm_release_secret, argocd_application, k8s_events, ocp_audit, prometheus metrics, and declared_revision_allowlist governance; weekly CSV exports archived to a restricted evidence index.
